# SL-IMG-009: social-image-size-outside-guidance

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

Social preview image size is outside configured guidance.

## Metadata

- Category: Images and social preview (images-social-preview)
- Default severity: info
- Confidence: heuristic
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- http-header
- raw-html

## Required Evidence

- image-url
- image-size
- policy-threshold

## When This Triggers

Compare social image content length or dimensions with non-blocking policy.

## False Positives

This rule is heuristic. Treat the diagnostic as a review prompt and use DSL
severity overrides or suppressions when project policy intentionally differs.

## How To Fix

Review social image dimensions and file size for provider compatibility.
